data.name: Elf World Adventure 10
data.detailed_description:
GAMEPLAY:



Elf World Adventure 10 is the continuation of the popular H-game in the anime and puzzle genre.
You’ll find many new levels where you need to assemble beautiful images of charming elf girls.
Immerse yourself in a relaxing atmosphere accompanied by gentle and melodic music.
Each puzzle reveals new scenes and emotions, creating a soothing and enjoyable experience.

FEATURES:



  • Hentai Experience: Enjoy the blend of puzzle-solving and erotic anime art.
  • Beautiful Atmosphere: Relaxing music and soft visuals create a cozy mood.
  • Simple Controls: Perfect for both newcomers and fans of the genre.
  • Steam Achievements: Decorate your profile with beautiful achievements.
  • Multiple Levels: Challenge yourself across many exciting stages.
  • Charming Elf Girls: Collect a gallery of gorgeous images!

data.short_description: Elf World Adventure 10 — a classic anime H-game with beautiful elf girls, a relaxing atmosphere, and plenty of engaging puzzles.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 保加利亞文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 匈牙利文, 越南文, 丹麥文, 印尼語, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 簡體中文, 韓文, 荷蘭文, 波蘭文, 俄文, 泰文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 芬蘭文, 瑞典文, 日文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 (64-bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-2300
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce GTX 760 or Radeon HD 7850
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 (64-bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-7400 or AMD Ryzen 3
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GeForce RTX 3060
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10 (64-bit)
  • Processor: Intel Core i5-2300
  • Memory: 1 GB RAM
  • Graphics: GeForce GTX 760 or Radeon HD 7850
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 1 GB available space
  • Sound Card: DirectX
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10 (64-bit)
  • Processor: Intel Core i5-7400 or AMD Ryzen 3
  • Memory: 1 GB RAM
  • Graphics: GeForce RTX 3060
  • DirectX: Version 11
  • Storage: 1 GB available space
  • Sound Card: DirectX
